projects.title: Sangamon County - IL 50204
projects.original_contract_value: $240,600 - Services | $200,962 - License | $40,200 -Maintenance | $481,762 - Total | Full Contract Link
projects.project_health: Yellow Appraisal and Tax team pushed their Go live to Q4 2026. An earlier EPL go live date has been rejected by the client. Client feels they must go live on both products at the same time. Met with SIC on 4/2 and determined that remaining budget can cover remaining effort (change requests and solution validation). Client’s GIS manager is working on re-creating queries and views needed to publish new map service that uses Tyler atENT as source for parcel data instead of the county’s legacy AS400 system. TSM Tickets: 12115525 1/9/2026 email setup; TSM Ticket: 12249592 SSRS location. TSM not responsive to attempts to escalate.
projects.client_health: Red Client Sponsor refuses to pay for additional hours to EPL implementation citing Tyler, specifically the aTEnt team, but Tyler nonetheless as the source of slippage. Due to delays with atENT implementation and turnover on that team Client is second guessing choosing Tyler for Appraisal and Tax. This is adversely affecting EPL. Client believes sales team did not properly articulate the need to maintain their own arcgis rest services. Sponsor said she would be seekign money from Tyler during 12/15/2025 call. Client repeatedly expresses concerns with team not appearing in synch with Tyler's atENT implementation team. Client often defaults to "that's not what sales told us." Bi-weekly status calls continue with steering committee to discuss and document Future State of parcel management and GIS across both EP&L and ATENT once AS400 legacy system is decommissioned. Integration plan delivered.
